chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4115 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.18154/2024 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case. 27-03-2025 Mr. Atta Muhammad Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner. Syed Irshad-ur-Rehman, advocate for respondent/FBR. Learned counsel for respondent department files parawise comments, which are taken on record. Per respective learned counsel this petition impugns notice, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Respective learned counsel seek that the notice be determined vide a speaking order after providing an opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent department articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
